# guardicore_incident (Resource)

Creates a security incident in Akamai Guardicore Segmentation. Incidents are **immutable** — they cannot be updated or deleted via the API. Any attribute change forces recreation, and `terraform destroy` only removes the incident from Terraform state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Minimal incident with required fields.
resource "guardicore_incident" "malware_detected" {
  type        = "CustomIncident"
  severity    = "HIGH"
  time        = 1711612800000
  description = "Malware detected on a production server"
  summary     = "### Malware Detection\n\nEndpoint security detected malicious activity on a production asset."
  tags        = ["malware", "production"]

  affected_assets_json = jsonencode([
    {
      type  = "IP"
      value = "10.0.1.50"
    },
  ])
}

# Incident demonstrating every optional argument.
resource "guardicore_incident" "suspicious_activity" {
  type        = "CustomIncident"
  severity    = "MEDIUM"
  time        = 1711616400000
  description = "Suspicious lateral movement detected"
  summary     = "### Suspicious Activity\n\nMultiple east-west connections were detected between sensitive assets."
  tags        = ["lateral-movement", "investigation"]
  origin      = "Terraform Example"
  mitigation  = "### Recommended Actions\n\n1. Isolate the source host.\n2. Review recent credentials."

  affected_assets_json = jsonencode([
    {
      type  = "IP"
      value = "10.0.2.10"
    },
    {
      type  = "IP"
      value = "10.0.2.11"
    },
  ])

  cef_extensions_json = jsonencode({
    sproc = "powershell.exe"
    dproc = "sqlservr.exe"
  })

  attached_files = [
    "file-id-1",
    "file-id-2",
  ]

  map_details_json = jsonencode({
    type = "conversation"
    time_filter = {
      from = 1711612800000
      to   = 1711616400000
    }
  })

  custom_defined_objects_json = jsonencode([
    {
      key   = "campaign"
      type  = "text"
      value = "spring-incident-review"
    },
  ])

  properties_json = jsonencode([
    {
      key   = "scanner_type"
      type  = "text"
      value = "lateral-movement"
    },
  ])
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `affected_assets_json` (String) JSON-encoded list of affected assets. Each asset should have `ip` and/or `vm` fields. Use `jsonencode()` to provide the value.
- `description` (String) Short description of the incident (1-200 characters).
- `severity` (String) The incident severity. Valid values: `LOW`, `MEDIUM`, `HIGH`.
- `summary` (String) Markdown-formatted incident summary (1-10000 characters).
- `tags` (List of String) List of tags (1-10 items).
- `time` (Number) Incident occurrence timestamp in milliseconds since epoch.
- `type` (String) The incident type (1-30 characters). For example: `CustomIncident`, `Malware Detection`.

### Optional

- `attached_files` (List of String) List of attached file IDs (0-6 items).
- `cef_extensions_json` (String) JSON-encoded CEF extensions to add to each CEF message. Use `jsonencode()` to provide the value.
- `custom_defined_objects_json` (String) JSON-encoded list of user-defined objects (max 30 items). Use `jsonencode()` to provide the value.
- `map_details_json` (String) JSON-encoded map details for viewing the incident in Akamai Guardicore Segmentation. Use `jsonencode()` to provide the value.
- `mitigation` (String) Markdown-formatted incident mitigation information (1-2000 characters).
- `origin` (String) Who created the incident (1-25 characters).
- `properties_json` (String) JSON-encoded list of related properties (max 20 items). Only for non-Hunt incidents. Use `jsonencode()` to provide the value.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the incident.
